---
title: "Interactive LLM Framework Explorer"
description: Explore different Python LLM frameworks and their capabilities through interactive Shiny templates
---

Explore various Python frameworks for building LLM-powered applications. Each template demonstrates different capabilities including basic chat, structured output, and tool calling.

::: {.panel-tabset .panel-pills}

### LangChain Basic

{{< include langchain-basic/index.qmd >}}

### LangChain Structured Output

{{< include langchain-structured-output/index.qmd >}}

### LangChain Tool Calling

{{< include langchain-tool-calling/index.qmd >}}

### LlamaIndex Basic

{{< include llama-index-basic/index.qmd >}}

### LlamaIndex Structured Output

{{< include llama-index-structured-output/index.qmd >}}

### LlamaIndex Tool Calling

{{< include llama-index-tool-calling/index.qmd >}}

### LLM Package Basic

{{< include llm-package-basic/index.qmd >}}

### LLM Package Structured Output

{{< include llm-package-structured-output/index.qmd >}}

### LLM Package Tool Calling

{{< include llm-package-tool-calling/index.qmd >}}

### Pydantic AI Basic

{{< include pydantic-ai-basic/index.qmd >}}

### Pydantic AI Structured Output

{{< include pydantic-ai-structured-output/index.qmd >}}

### Pydantic AI Tool Calling

{{< include pydantic-ai-tool-calling/index.qmd >}}

:::
